# conn_comp { #neuroim.conn_comp }

```python
conn_comp(
    x,
    threshold=0,
    cluster_table=True,
    local_maxima=True,
    local_maxima_dist=15,
    connect='26-connect',
    *,
    mask=None,
    two_tailed=False,
)
```

Find connected components in an image.

Identifies and labels spatially connected regions in neuroimaging data,
supporting both binary masks and thresholded volumes.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name              | Type                                     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Default        |
|-------------------|------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------|
| x                 | [NeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.NeuroVol`) | The image object.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | _required_     |
| threshold         | [float](`float`)                         | Threshold defining lower intensity bound for the binary mask. Default is 0.  See ``two_tailed`` for two-sided thresholding.                                                                                                                                                                                                   | `0`            |
| cluster_table     | [bool](`bool`)                           | Whether to return the cluster statistics table.  Default True.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | `True`         |
| local_maxima      | [bool](`bool`)                           | Whether to compute local maxima within clusters.  Default True.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | `True`         |
| local_maxima_dist | [float](`float`)                         | Minimum distance between local maxima in mm.  Default 15.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `15`           |
| connect           | [str](`str`)                             | Connectivity pattern: "26-connect", "18-connect", or "6-connect". Default "26-connect".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | `'26-connect'` |
| mask              | LogicalNeuroVol, optional (keyword only) | Restrict clustering to voxels where ``mask`` is True.  When supplied, ``verify.assert_same_space(x, mask)`` is invoked first so a foreign-affine mask raises before any clustering.                                                                                                                                           | `None`         |
| two_tailed        | bool, optional (keyword only)            | When True, threshold the absolute value (``\|x.data\| > threshold``) so both positive- and negative-tail clusters survive.  ``peak_value`` in the cluster table is read back from the original signed data so the sign of each cluster is retained.  Default False (one-tailed ``x.data > threshold``, the legacy behaviour). | `False`        |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                            | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | [ConnCompResult](`neuroim.connected_components.ConnCompResult`) | ``index`` (``ClusteredNeuroVol``), ``size`` (``NeuroVol``), ``voxels``, ``cluster_table``, ``local_maxima``, and ``provenance`` (populated with ``method_name="conn_comp"`` and the input space + mask hashes). |
